items.raw_desc: Termosztátfej Honeywell Home EvoHome EVO-TRV, vezeték nélküli:The Honeywell Home EvoHome EVO-TRV (HR93) is a modern wireless solution for smart and economical heating control within the Evohome zone system. It is designed for installation on radiator valves and allows precise temperature control in individual rooms. Thanks to its ergonomic design and large backlit display, it offers convenient control directly on the head. It is the ideal choice for new installations and upgrades to existing Evohome systems. The EVO-TRV head (HR93) is the successor to the HR92 and meets the latest EU safety requirements thanks to the R3 wireless protocol.
